import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(string.trim(line))
mut total = 0
mut stopped = false
for p in parts
  if not stopped
    let n = match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if total + n > 100
      stopped = true
    else
      total = total + n
    end
  end
end

println("total=#{total}")
